---
title: "Data being used"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Packages

```{r, warnings = F, message = F, echo = T}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(labelled)
```

## Load BSA teaching data

```{r}
df <- read_sav('/Users/joecrowley/R/Data/BSA Teaching Data/spss/spss25/bsa2019_poverty_open.sav', user_na = T)
```

## Variable summary

```{r}
names(df)

df %>% glimpse

look_for(df, details = "none")

look_for(df)
```
